calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Steven Soltman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sherman Clay & Co, an Indiana Corporation DBA Music Acceptance Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness Melodi Tobin was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Dina F. Reyes Rosario and Gregorio Rosario as follows:
Damages $44,453.19
Prejudgment Interest $5,322.01
Attorney's Fees $2,000.00
Costs $519.00, for a total of $52,294.20
Plaintiff is also awarded possession of the Steinway piano Serial Number 560046.
Judgment signed in open court.
